name: tier-proof-circuit
description: Circom circuit for Proof of Farm tier verification

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup tier_proof.r1cs pot12_final.ptau tier_proof_0000.zkey
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey tier_proof_final.zkey verification_key.json
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove tier_proof_final.zkey witness.wtns proof.json public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify verification_key.json public.json proof.json
scripts.full-setup: npm run compile && npm run setup && npm run contribute && npm run export-vkey
